title: Lexhannen Torlock

{{Quote|He made the mistake of betraying the Emperor. He tried to deliver some secret plans to the Rebel Alliance. The Emperor had him killed.|S'ybll posing as Frija Torlock|<ref name="ANHTLoLS15" />}}
'''Lexhannen Torlock''' was the Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]]. He was incredibly paranoid and believed that the Rebels were planning to capture Corulag. Torlock put all his money into increasing the defenses of the planet, but he also put a substantial amount into devising an escape route. In secret, he hired the Imperial [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]], [[Massad Thrumble]] to create [[Human replica droid]]s of himself and his daughter [[Frija Torlock|Frija]].<ref name="TEGtD">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref><ref name="SS" />

Unfortunately for Torlock, the attack did not come from the rebels, but from his own daughter. Frija wanted to rule Corulag herself and devised a plan alongside Torlock's most trusted confidant, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Droon]], to implicate Torlock as a traitor. Torlock learned of the plan and fled off-world. Before leaving he activated the two droids to act as decoys. Admiral Droon's men captured the [[Lexhannen Torlock (droid)|false Torlock]] and discovered that the real Torlock had departed Corulag. Droon's men used a hologram of Torlock to give the appearance that their Governor had not left the world. The ruse also succeeded in capturing the [[Frija Torlock (droid)|droid]] with the resemblance of Frija.<ref name="SS" />

At the same time, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] had sent his agent, [[Wrenga Jixton]] to deal with Torlock who he believed was a traitor. Vader eventually learned of how Torlock had been wrongfully fingered, and he executed Droon for his treachery.<ref name="SS" /> Sometime after the Battle of Hoth, the [[mind-witch]] [[S'ybll]] posed as Torlock's daughter in order to gain [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] trust. While posing as Frija, S'ybll told Skywalker that Lehannen had been executed after betraying the Empire. However, due to the ruse, it was unknown if this information was reliable.<ref name="ANHTLoLS15">''[[A New Hope: The Life of Luke Skywalker]]'', Chapter 15</ref>
